headline: Helix Energy Solutions and TechnipFMC Shares Plummet, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks fell in the morning session after WTI crude oil plunged on Iran-US peace deal progress and renewed hopes for reopening the Strait of Hormuz. Oilfield services companies (Schlumberger (SLB), Halliburton (HAL), Baker Hughes (BKR), TechnipFMC, and the offshore drillers) get paid only when oil producers spend money drilling new wells.
